folio.label: 77v
folio.l: Where as he hopetú, for to fynden grace
To lerne what thyngö , wommen louen moost
But he ne coude , aryuen in no coost
Where as he mygút fynde , in this matere
Two creatures , accordynge in fere
Some seyden , wommen louen best richesse

note.notetxt: 898There is a cross in dry point in the left margin, it takes 2-3 lines.ODR

folio.l: Some seiden honour , some seyden Iolynesse
Some seiden riche aray , some seiden lust a bedde
And ofte tymes to be wydewe , and wedde
Some seiden that oure hert , is most eased
Whan that we ben , I flatered , and I plesed
He gotú ful ny the sothe , I wol nat lye
A man shal wynne vs best , witú flaterie
And witú attendaunce , and besynesse
Ben we I lymed , bothe more & lesse
And some seyn , that we louen best
For to be free , & do rigút as vs list
And that noman , repreeue vs , of oure vice
But seye , æat we ben wyse , & no thyngö nyce
For trewely , there is noon of vs alle
If ony wygút , wyl clawe vs on the galle
That we nyl kyke , for he seitú vs sotú
Assay , and he shal fynde it , æ so dotú
For be we neuäe , so vicious witú Inne

note.notetxt: 916There is a cross in dry point in the left margin, it takes 4-5 lines.ODR

folio.l: We wol be holden , wys , and clene of synne
And some seiden , that gret delyt han we
For to be holden stable , and eke secree
And on a purpos , stedfastly to dwelle
And nougút be wreye thyngö , that men vs telle
But that tale is nougút wortú , a rake stele
Parde , we wommen , conne no thyngö hele
Wytnesse on Myda , wol ©e here the tale

note.notetxt: 924There is a pointing hand in the left margin.Est

folio.l: Ouyde a monges , othere thynges smale
Seide , Myda had , vnder his longe heeres
Growyngö vp on his hed , two asses eres
The whicú vice he hid , as he best mygút
Ful sotilly , fro euäy mannes sigút
That saw his wyf , there wyst of it no moo
He loued hire most , and trosted hire also
He preyede hire , that to no creature
She shulde tellen , of his disfigure
She swor hi~ nay , for al this world to wynne
She nolde do , that velanye or synne
To make hire husbonde , han so foul a name
She nolde nat telle it , for hire owen shame
But natheles , hire thougút rigút that he deyed
That she so longe , shulde a counseil hide
